data.title: CDLM by Together AI speeds up AI inference by 14.5x, maintaining accuracy in coding and math tasks.
data.description: Language models that follow Consistency Diffusion approach have successfully addressed two major hindrances in AI inference. These models have demonstrated significant latency enhancements of up to 14.5 times without compromising accuracy in tasks related to coding and math.

data.title: Ventura Yachts renews partnership with YachtWorld, connecting top brands to global audience.
data.description: On February 19, 2026, YachtWorld renewed its partnership with Ventura Yachts, a leading European motorboat and superyacht specialist. Ventura Yachts is an authorized dealer for renowned brands such as Riva, Pershing, Itama, and Ferretti Yachts in the United States. This partnership signifies a continuation of their collaboration within the luxury yacht industry.

data.title: GTX shares down on cautious FY26 outlook despite Q4 earnings beat: net sales of $891m, 6% increase Y/Y, EPS 42 cents.
data.description: Garrett Motion Inc. (NASDAQ: GTX) saw a decline in premarket trading following the release of its fourth-quarter earnings report. The company reported net sales of $891 million, marking a 6% increase year-over-year and surpassing the consensus estimate of $875.16 million. Commercial vehicle sales climbed 9% Y/Y, while aftermarket sales grew by 4% Y/Y. The sales growth was primarily driven by favorable foreign currency rates and heightened demand for commercial vehicles and diesel applications. Adjusted earnings per share stood at 42 cents, exceeding the 36 cent estimate, with a net income of $84 million for the quarter. Adjusted EBIT reached $122 million, resulting in an adjusted EBIT margin of 13.7%. The company also showcased solid cash flow generation and capital allocation strategies in its operations.

data.title: Divi Resorts promotes exclusive direct booking perks for Caribbean travel, focusing on flexibility and value for guests.
data.description: Amidst efforts to enhance Caribbean travel for modern tourists, Divi Resorts from Chapel Hill, N.C., announced on February 19, 2026, they are dedicated to offering increased flexibility and accessibility. This move aims to provide a more rewarding experience for travelers, emphasizing the advantages of visiting the Caribbean. The initiative signifies a significant step towards accommodating the evolving preferences of tourists by offering more options for every traveler.

data.title: Accenture monitors senior staff AI tool logins, links promotions to adoption rates, amid job threats.
data.description: A prominent consulting company known as Accenture has implemented a new policy where they are closely monitoring the logins of their senior staff to AI tools. Additionally, they are linking career progression within the company to the rates of adoption of these AI tools. This initiative comes as AI technology poses a threat to jobs, potentially leading to job elimination.

data.title: Booking Holdings stock hits 52-week low after analyst downgrades due to AI concerns. Quarterly sales: $6.349 billion, exceeding estimates. Key analysts lower price forecasts.
data.description: Booking Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: BKNG) stock saw a decline after several analyst firms, including Piper Sandler and Cantor Fitzgerald, lowered their price forecasts, citing concerns over potential disruption from artificial intelligence in the online travel agency industry. The company reported quarterly earnings of $48.80 per share, surpassing the analyst consensus of $48.27 per share, and quarterly sales of $6.349 billion, exceeding the estimate of $6.130 billion. Booking Holdings expects first-quarter sales of $5.429 billion-$5.524 billion, higher than the market estimates of $5.359 billion. Key analysts, such as RBC Capital's Brad Erickson, maintained an Outperform rating with a price forecast of $6100, while DA Davidson's Tom White maintained a Buy rating and lowered the price forecast from $6600 to $6000. Benchmark's Daniel Kurnos reiterated a Buy rating and dropped the price forecast from $6400 to $5600. Oppenheimer analyst Jed Kelly... (For full story, refer to Benzinga.com)

data.title: KnowBe4 names Yuneeb Khan as CFO, succeeding Bob Reich who retires; Reich to advise until Q1 2026. CEO Palma to supervise.
data.description: Tampa Bay-based company KnowBe4, known for its comprehensive approach to human and AI risk management, has appointed Yuneeb Khan as its new Chief Financial Officer. Khan takes over from Bob Reich, who is retiring. In his new role, Khan will report directly to CEO Bryan Palma. Reich will continue to advise the company until Q1 2026 to ensure a smooth transition. Khan's background includes significant experience in both public and private companies.

data.title: Chubb appoints Scott Henck as Global Chief Actuary, Cynthia Bentley promoted to North America Chief Actuary, Paul O'Connell to retire.
data.description: Chubb Limited recently announced the appointment of Cynthia Bentley as the new Chief Actuary for North America, succeeding Scott Henck. Henck, the former Executive Vice President, is retiring, with the change taking effect on February 19, 2026. Chubb Limited (NYSE: CB) disclosed this update, marking a significant shift in leadership within the company. Bentley's promotion comes as she steps into the role previously held by Henck, while Paul O'Connell is set to retire. This transition will see a new Senior Vice President take the reins in the actuarial department, shaping the future of Chubb Limited in North America.

data.title: Google searches for 'Bitcoin Going to Zero' surge as crypto sentiment sours with recent price drop. Investors seeking reasons for the plunge.
data.description: The significant drop in Bitcoin's value has sparked curiosity among many investors and onlookers who are eager to understand the reasons behind the cryptocurrency's sharp decline.

data.title: Integrate Claude Opus 4.6 in popular IDEs: Visual Studio, JetBrains, Xcode, Eclipse via GitHub Copilot chat interface.
data.description: Anthropic's premier AI model, Claude Opus 4.6, is now accessible on popular platforms like Visual Studio, JetBrains, Xcode, and Eclipse via GitHub Copilot's chat interface. This integration allows developers to leverage the advanced capabilities of Claude Opus 4.6 seamlessly within their preferred development environments. By making this AI model widely available, Anthropic aims to enhance the efficiency and productivity of software developers across various platforms.

data.title: Occidental Petroleum shares rose after Q4 earnings, beating estimate with 31 cents adj EPS & 1,481 Mboed production. Oil stocks up on higher crude prices amidst geopolitical tensions. Kinetik Holdings mulls sale after Occidental-backed Western Midstream interest.
data.description: Occidental Petroleum Corporation (NYSE: OXY) saw a rise in shares following its fourth-quarter earnings report, released after the market closed. The surge is linked to the overall increase in oil stocks due to elevated crude prices amid rising tensions involving Iran. Additionally, Kinetik Holdings (NYSE: KNTK) is considering a potential sale after attracting interest from Western Midstream Partners, backed by Occidental. Occidental outperformed expectations with an adjusted earnings per share of 31 cents, surpassing the estimated 18 cents. The company's total production reached 1,481 million barrels of oil equivalent per day (Mboed). For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Penn State invests in AI education & research to prepare students. AI Transformation initiative aims to equip students with necessary skills.
data.description: Penn State recently revealed significant investments aimed at solidifying its position as a frontrunner in artificial intelligence education, cross-disciplinary research, and innovation. With AI impacting various aspects of society, the university aims to prepare students for success in this evolving landscape. Through the AI Transformation initiative, Penn State is enhancing its current foundation to equip students with essential skills. This strategic move underscores the university's commitment to staying ahead in the realm of AI.

data.title: Israel Tech Week Miami (ISRTW) to return April 27-30, 2026, connecting Israeli innovation with global markets, with 1,500+ attendees.
data.description: Israel Tech Week Miami (ISRTW) is set to take place from April 27 to 30, 2026, in Miami. The event serves as a key platform linking Israeli innovation to global markets like the U.S. It aims to gather founders, venture capitalists, industry leaders, multinational executives, government officials, and ecosystem influencers for a week dedicated to cross-border growth, forming strategic collaborations, and facilitating deals. Following the success of its 2025 edition that attracted over 1,500 participants, the upcoming event is expected to draw a substantial attendance as well.

data.title: LKQ Corporation stock rose on exceeding revenue expectations despite missing profit estimates. Q4 sales were $3.312 billion.
data.description: LKQ Corporation's (NASDAQ: LKQ) stock saw a slight increase as they surpassed revenue forecasts despite falling short on adjusted profit. The company's fourth-quarter adjusted earnings per share stood at 59 cents, below the expected 65 cents. However, their quarterly sales totaled $3.312 billion, a 2.7% increase from the previous year, beating the Street's projection of $3.253 billion. LKQ also revealed a new restructuring plan and a 2026 outlook that was lower than consensus estimates. Investors are now contemplating the future of LKQ shares given this mixed performance.

data.title: James Hardie Industries receives RS Rating upgrade indicating improving technical performance. Will growth continue?
data.description: James Hardie Industries has received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating improved technical performance. This raises questions on whether this positive trend will persist.

data.title: Sturm Ruger stock sees RS rating shoot higher, showing improving technical performance. Will it continue?
data.description: Sturm Ruger recently received a boost in its Relative Strength Rating, indicating improving technical performance. This upgrade suggests the stock is showing positive momentum. The company's RS Rating has seen a significant increase, reflecting potential for continued growth. The improved rating raises expectations for the future performance of Sturm Ruger.
